name: Power Lens Mk. I
description: Tune a focusing lens with insulated wiring to boost energy output.
success_message: You assemble a crisp new Power Lens Mk. I.

name: Ergonomic Grip
description: Mold reinforced weave and scrap into a steadier weapon grip.
success_message: You mold an Ergonomic Grip that feels perfect in the hand.

name: Armor Plating Mk. I
description: Press scrap into a simple ablative armor plate.
success_message: You bolt together Armor Plating Mk. I.

name: Insulated Lining
description: Stitch insulated wiring through weave to soften energy discharge.
success_message: You stitch an Insulated Lining that hums with safety.

name: Portable Stove
description: Assemble scrap plates and insulated wiring into a reusable field burner for cooked provisions.
success_message: You assemble a Portable Stove. Cooking recipes are now viable anywhere you can work.

name: Functional Cryo-Inductor
description: Repair the damaged Cryo-Inductor and wire its cold loop into Nova's cutter to unlock Cryo Vent.
success_message: The Cryo-Inductor locks into the cutter. Cryo Vent is online: make targets Brittle, then follow with physical attacks.

name: Repaired Projector
description: Replace the cracked controller board and restore the school's projector.
success_message: You repaired Schoolteacher Kasey's projector.

name: Repaired Arcade Display
description: Thread nano-filament through the dead pixel lattice.
success_message: You repaired Sam and Ellie's arcade display.

name: Repaired Coffee Grinder
description: Re-seat the grinder teeth and patch the cracked drive housing.
success_message: You repaired Maddie's coffee grinder.

name: Spicy Ramen
description: Use the bench heater and pressure cup to turn field supplies into a sharp combat meal.
success_message: You seal a steaming bowl of Spicy Ramen.

name: Ration Soup
description: Stretch a ration pack into a warmer, cleaner recovery meal.
success_message: You turn the ration pack into a restorative soup.

name: Glowfish Broth
description: Stabilize glow-water fish into a mineral broth that steadies the hands.
success_message: You brew a bowl of Glowfish Broth.

name: Resonance Carp Stew
description: Simmer resonance carp with meat and herbs until the hum settles into something restorative.
success_message: You cook a warm pot of Resonance Carp Stew.

name: Chime Minnow Broth
description: Clarify a rare chime minnow with glowfish minerals into a bright restorative broth.
success_message: You ladle out a clear bowl of Chime Minnow Broth.

name: Stellarium Eel Skewer
description: Char a mineral-rich runoff eel over a field burner until the scales stop sparking.
success_message: You cook a Stellarium Eel Skewer that snaps with heat.

name: Frequency Tetra Consomme
description: Clarify false-tide fish and herbs into a precise broth that rings at the edge of hearing.
success_message: You finish a Frequency Tetra Consomme that hums in the cup.

name: Source Resin Mod
description: Process beast meat and jungle herbs into a thick, protective Source-insulating resin.
success_message: You synthesize a jar of Source Resin.

name: Thermal Cutter
description: Rebuild the Dominion cutter head into a controlled tool for cauterizing razor-vines.
success_message: You repair the Thermal Cutter. Its edge glows hot enough to seal razor-vines as it cuts.

name: Rapid Capacitor Mod
description: Combine scrap metal and insulated wiring into an overclocked rapid capacitor.
success_message: You assemble a humming Rapid Capacitor.

name: Photon Core Mod
description: Tune Source Resin through a focusing lens to create a compact thermal light-core.
success_message: You align the Photon Core Mod until its light holds steady.

name: Nanite Plating Mod
description: Thread nano-filament through armor plating so the surface can knit itself under pressure.
success_message: You finish a plate that flexes before your fingers touch it.

name: Resonance Capacitor Mod
description: Stabilize an overclocked capacitor with Source Resin and nano-filament.
success_message: You build a Resonance Capacitor Mod that charges in silence.

name: Reinforced Resin Rod
description: Rewire a Resin Rod with a bite sensor and reinforced guide loops for heavier runoff catches.
success_message: You tune a Reinforced Resin Rod that holds steady under pressure.

name: Harmonic Carbon Rod
description: Stabilize carbon thread with Source Resin and nano-filament so the rod can ride standing waves.
success_message: You build a Harmonic Carbon Rod that flexes in time with the air.

name: Harmonic Spool Lure
description: Tune a Ghost-Signal Lure with a chime minnow bone and insulated wire so it clicks across layered frequencies.
success_message: You finish a Harmonic Spool Lure that taps out three rhythms at once.
